creator: cyberbotx@cyberbotx.com
text:
I have an issue with the commit done for this PR. It removes the 
${PORT_OPTIONS:MDOCS} conditional in post-install. This should NOT have been 
done, because the files it tries to install do not exist in the work directory 
when the DOCS option is disabled. Can this please be fixed?

Thanks,
Naram Qashat
